name: FloatingWindow
searchText: floatingwindow draggable floating area @mantine/core /core/floating-window axis constrainoffset constraintoviewport draghandleselector enabled excludedraghandleselector initialposition ondragend ondragstart onpositionchange portalprops radius setpositionref shadow withborder withinportal zindex

props.name: axis
props.description: If set, restricts movement to the specified axis

props.name: constrainOffset
props.description: The offset from the viewport edges when constraining the element. Requires constrainToViewport: true.

props.name: constrainToViewport
props.description: If true, the element can only move within the current viewport boundaries.

props.name: dragHandleSelector
props.description: Selector of an element that should be used to drag floating window. If not specified, the entire root element is used as a drag target.

props.name: enabled
props.description: If false, the element can not be dragged.

props.name: excludeDragHandleSelector
props.description: Selector of an element within dragHandleSelector that should be excluded from the drag event.

props.name: initialPosition
props.description: Initial position. If not set, calculated from element styles.

props.name: onPositionChange
props.description: Called when the element position changes

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius, numbers are converted to rem

props.name: setPositionRef
props.description: Assigns ref to set position programmatically

props.name: shadow
props.description: Key of theme.shadows or any valid CSS value to set box-shadow

props.name: withBorder
props.description: Adds border to the root element

props.name: withinPortal
props.description: Determines whether the window should be rendered inside Portal
